0.title: Meet PocketCare
0.body: Your calm money companion — track spending, plan ahead, and reach your goals, all in one private place that works offline.

1.title: Start here: add your accounts
1.body: Add your bank, cash and cards so PocketCare knows your starting balances. This one step powers everything else — your net worth, budgets and insights.

2.title: Log money in seconds
2.body: Record what you spend or earn — type it, or just tap the mic and say it out loud. PocketCare even suggests the category for you.

3.title: Know where it goes
3.body: Set simple budgets that nudge you early, and see clear, beautiful insights into where your money actually goes each month.

4.title: Plan what's coming
4.body: Salary, rent, bills, EMIs and subscriptions in one view — so upcoming payments never take you by surprise.

5.title: Reach your goals
5.body: Build an emergency buffer first, then set money aside for what matters and see exactly when you'll get there.

6.title: Not sure? Just ask
6.body: Ask PocketCare in plain words — "where did my money go?", "can I afford this?" — and it'll answer or take you right to the screen.

footer: Create an account to sync across devices. Guest data stays on this device and is kept for 3 days.
